seoTitle: Pilliga vs Pilot Wilderness — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pilliga and Pilot Wilderness. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pilliga vs Pilot Wilderness: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pilliga and Pilot Wilderness.
heading: Pilliga vs Pilot Wilderness — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pilliga, New South Wales and Pilot Wilderness, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pilot Wilderness has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Pilliga (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pilliga or Pilot Wilderness safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pilliga has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Pilot Wilderness scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pilliga scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Pilot Wilderness scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pilliga or Pilot Wilderness?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pilot Wilderness has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
